transcript:
CALLER: Uh, good morning. Main Dr. Ramesh Patil se milna chahta hoon, orthopaedic wale. Kab available hain woh?
AGENT: Good morning! Dr. Ramesh Patil is available on Monday, Wednesday, and Friday from 10 AM to 1 PM. Aapko kaunse din aana convenient rahega?
CALLER: Friday theek rahega. Morning slot dijiye.
AGENT: Friday ke liye 10:30 AM ka slot available hai. Aapka naam aur contact number?
CALLER: Vijay Kulkarni. Number hai 9812003344.
AGENT: Perfect. Appointment book ho gayi — Mr. Vijay Kulkarni, Dr. Ramesh Patil ke saath, is Friday 10:30 AM. Confirmation SMS aayega aapke number pe.
CALLER: Theek hai, dhanyawad.
AGENT: Aapka swagat hai! Khyaal rakhein.
